title: NGS Library Prep Size Selection Protocol
author: Opentrons

steps.instruction: This protocol performs the final size selection step of NGS library prep. --- * [Eppendorf twin.tec 96-well PCR plate 150ul #0030128605](https://online-shop.eppendorf.com/OC-en/Laboratory-Consumables-44512/Plates-44516/Eppendorf-twin.tec-PCR-Plates-PF-8180.html) * [Opentrons magnetic module](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/hardware-modules/products/magdeck) * [Opentrons 4-in-1 tuberack](https://shop.opentrons.com/products/tube-rack-set-1?_ga=2.256255875.900706806.1575911292-1245111371.1550251253) with 4x6 insert for [2ml Eppendorf snapcap tubes](https://online-shop.eppendorf.us/US-en/Laboratory-Consumables-44512/Tubes-44515/Eppendorf-Safe-Lock-Tubes-PF-8863.html) or equivalent. * [Opentrons 10ul and 200ul filter tipracks](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips) * [Opentrons GEN1 P10 and P300 single-channel electronic pipettes](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes/products/single-channel-electronic-pipette) --- 4x6 tuberack with 2ml Eppendorf snapcap tubes (slot 2) * tube A1: SPRI beads * tube B1-B3: 80% ethanol * tube C1: Low EDTA TE
Input the number of samples to process, bead mix volume (uL), bead mix speed (uL/s), bead mix repetitions, and the respective mount sides for your P10 and p300 single-channel pipettes.
Upload your protocol into the OT App.
Set up your deck according to the deck map.
Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
